notes: This directory is the authoritative staged golden ISA definition for v0.4-draft.
v0.4-draft extends v0.3 with kernel IO + operand namespace encoding clarifications (RegId10 domain mapping, SrcRType semantics, etc.).
Vector encodings remain 64-bit: 32-bit prefix carries only Reg*[9:5] + prefix identification; main part retains scalar opcode semantics.
